rule_details.description: HttpPost constructor replaced by ClassicRequestBuilder factory method in HttpClient 5.x
RequestConfig.normalizeUri property removed in HttpClient 5.x; URIUtils.normalizeSyntax is no longer public
URIUtils.normalizeSyntax() is no longer public in HttpClient 5.x; use URIBuilder.normalize()/optimize()
BasicHttpContext replaced by HttpCoreContext / HttpClientContext in HttpClient 5.x
HttpClients.custom().addInterceptorLast() replaced by addExecInterceptorFirst() in HttpClient 5.x
HttpClients.custom().setRetryHandler() renamed to setRetryStrategy() in HttpClient 5.x
HttpEntityEnclosingRequest interface replaced by HttpEntityContainer in HttpClient 5.x
HttpMessage.getAllHeaders() renamed to MessageHeaders.getHeaders() in HttpClient 5.x
HttpRequest.getRequestLine() removed in HttpClient 5.x; wrap with new RequestLine(request)
HttpRequestBase renamed to HttpUriRequestBase in HttpClient 5.x
HttpResponse.getEntity() removed in HttpClient 5.x; cast response to ClassicHttpResponse
StatusLine interface removed from org.apache.http in HttpClient 5.x
PoolingHttpClientConnectionManager replaced by PoolingAsyncClientConnectionManager in HttpClient 5.x async APIs
CloseableHttpClient replaced by CloseableHttpAsyncClient when migrating to HttpClient 5.x async APIs
Apache HttpClient 4.x async client (httpasyncclient) is replaced by HttpClient 5.x (httpclient5)
FutureCallback moved from org.apache.http.concurrent to org.apache.hc.core5.concurrent in HttpClient 5.x
IOReactorConfig moved from org.apache.http.impl.nio.reactor to org.apache.hc.core5.reactor in HttpClient 5.x
PoolingNHttpClientConnectionManager (HC4 async) replaced by PoolingAsyncClientConnectionManager in HttpClient 5.x
CloseableHttpAsyncClient moved from org.apache.http.impl.nio.client to org.apache.hc.client5.http.impl.async in HttpClient 5.x
HttpAsyncClients factory moved from org.apache.http.impl.nio.client to org.apache.hc.client5.http.impl.async in HttpClient 5.x
BasicCredentialsProvider moved from org.apache.http.impl.client to org.apache.hc.client5.http.impl.auth in HttpClient 5.x
setConnectTimeout(int) moved from RequestConfig to ConnectionConfig with Timeout parameter in HttpClient 5.x
setSocketTimeout(int) removed from RequestConfig; moved to ConnectionConfig with Timeout parameter in HttpClient 5.x
setSoTimeout(int) parameter type changed to Timeout in HttpClient 5.x
setConnectionTimeToLive(long, TimeUnit) signature changed to setConnectionTimeToLive(TimeValue) in HttpClient 5.x
HttpClients.custom().setConnectionTimeToLive() removed; time-to-live now configured via ConnectionConfig
HttpClients.custom().setDefaultSocketConfig() removed; socket config now set on connection manager
RequestConfig.setConnectTimeout(int) moved to ConnectionConfig.setConnectTimeout(Timeout) in HttpClient 5.x
RequestConfig.setSocketTimeout(int) moved to ConnectionConfig.setSocketTimeout(Timeout) in HttpClient 5.x
HttpClientConnectionManager.closeExpiredConnections() renamed to ConnPoolControl.closeExpired() in HttpClient 5.x
HttpClientConnectionManager.closeIdleConnections() renamed to ConnPoolControl.closeIdle() in HttpClient 5.x
Apache HttpClient 4.x artifact replaced by httpclient5 in HttpClient 5.x
Apache HttpCore 4.x artifact replaced by httpcore5 in HttpClient 5.x
Apache HttpClient 4.x (org.apache.http) package namespace replaced by org.apache.hc in 5.x
HttpResponse.getStatusLine() removed in HttpClient 5.x; use getCode() and getReasonPhrase()
CookieSpecs / StandardCookieSpec relocated from org.apache.http to org.apache.hc in HttpClient 5.x
ClientProtocolException moved from org.apache.http.client to org.apache.hc.client5.http in HttpClient 5.x
BasicCookieStore moved from org.apache.http.impl.client to org.apache.hc.client5.http.cookie in HttpClient 5.x
EntityTemplate moved from org.apache.http.entity to org.apache.hc.core5.http.io.entity in HttpClient 5.x
SSLConnectionSocketFactory (org.apache.http) replaced by new SSL builder API in HttpClient 5.x
SSLContexts moved from org.apache.http.ssl to org.apache.hc.core5.ssl in HttpClient 5.x
HttpClients.custom().setSSLSocketFactory() removed; SSL config now via PoolingHttpClientConnectionManagerBuilder
ManagedHttpClientConnection cast to get SSL session simplified to HttpCoreContext.getSSLSession() in HttpClient 5.x

overlaps.reason: httpclient-4-to-httpclient-5-00050 pattern is substring of httpclient-4-to-httpclient-5-00200
httpclient-4-to-httpclient-5-00060 pattern is substring of httpclient-4-to-httpclient-5-00210
httpclient-4-to-httpclient-5-00080 pattern is substring of httpclient-4-to-httpclient-5-00180
